content: Traditional RAG’s rigid top-k keyword or semantic matching can be augmented by a spreading activation-inspired dynamic weighting system, where retrieved initial documents activate semantically related chunks in the knowledge base proportional to their connection strength, rather than just pulling static pre-ranked results. This mimics how human memory recalls associated ideas after retrieving an initial memory, creating a more contextually rich and associative retrieval sequence than standard RAG.
source_topics: **Spreading Activation for large language model associative recall
